Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Checklist Completed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Checklist Completed to follow SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days, defined as the duration between its occurrence and the subsequent SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed when the latter precedes the former in a variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Comparison of the duration between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Checklist Completed versus the duration between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants where export occurs after the due notification
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in variants that proceed beyond checklist completion
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to any subsequent reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Average waiting time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days until the next non-system administrative action in the review process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and the end of the case

Name: Time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-EIC Reject in variants ending in rejection without checklist completion
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and the first occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in complex variants involving multiple assignment attempts
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Duration from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision) grouped by variant outcome
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Accept'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
